violations.text: American cheese was observed held over fill line at 45F degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per interview with PIC, cheese has been in unit less than 1 hour prior. Cheese that was relocated to rapidly chill, reviewed cold holding procedures with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026
Several ceiling tiles in the back kitchen were observed with stains from previous water damage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026
